official_pick_rules.note: Lab Score is setup quality. It is not win probability. Official picks require both strong win probability and strong setup quality.

summary: 2 official moneyline picks cleared the stricter model-probability and Lab Score gates. 4 value-watch setups had good price math but did not clear official-pick probability rules.
